programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: A blind man Pyare and his deaf friend Mohan fall in love with twin sisters Preeti and Priya. But their relationships spiral into chaos when the sisters get falsely implicated in a murder case and the men have to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Aan: Men At Work
programme.desc: On a mission to make Mumbai crime-free, DCP Hari Om Patnaik and his team fights against some corrupt politicians and their associates. In the process, their faith in law and order is put to test.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
